positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    rockie != turtle).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    rockie != rabbit).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    rockie != squirrel).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define spotted(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define calm(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define skittish(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define squirrel(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define rabbit(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define cute(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define turtle(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for neg
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u20,axiom,
    turtle(sK0)).

cnf(u23,axiom,
    rockie != rabbit).

cnf(u22,axiom,
    rockie != squirrel).

cnf(u24,negated_conjecture,
    ~turtle(rockie)).

cnf(u21,axiom,
    rockie != turtle).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define spotted(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define calm(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define skittish(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define squirrel(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define rabbit(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define cute(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
